Name: UStackBox
Description:
A stack box widget is a layout panel allowing child widgets to be automatically laid out
  vertically or horizontally.
 
   Many Children
   Flows Vertical or Horizontal

Variables.Name: Orientation
Variables.Description: The orientation of the stack box.

Functions.Name: GetOrientation
Functions.Description: Get the orientation of the stack box.

Functions.Name: SetOrientation
Functions.Description: Set the orientation of the stack box. The existing elements will be rearranged.

Functions.Name: AddChildToStackBox
Functions.Description: Adds a new child widget to the container.

Functions.Name: ReplaceStackBoxChildAt
Functions.Description: Replace the widget at the given index it with a different widget.
